title: Jennifer Cutaia
compiled_truth: Jennifer Cutaia is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-06 to 2001-11-09), Jennifer Cutaia sent 13 and received 95 emails, totalling 108 interactions. Top correspondents: [Judy Hernandez](people/judy-hernandez) (13), [Crystal Reyna](people/crystal-reyna) (10), [Silvia Garcia](people/silvia-garcia-viatel) (9), [Lauratietje](people/lauratietje-aol) (9), [Steve Jacobo](people/steve-jacobo) (8).
